svg.text: 4 ESP32 nodes + Sensors + Relay + Lighting + Camera + 2 Smart Plugs | ~$220
SporePrint Server | Mosquitto MQTT :1883 | Web UI :3001
Same MOSFET circuit: GPIO26 -> 100R -> IRLZ44N -> Exhaust Fan -> +12V
Same MOSFET circuit: GPIO27 -> 100R -> IRLZ44N -> Circ Fan -> +12V
Same MOSFET circuit: GPIO14 -> 100R -> IRLZ44N -> [user device] -> +12V
Powers all fans + LED strips via MOSFET drain circuits
GPIO -> 100R resistor -> Gate | 10K pull-down: Gate to GND
Drain -> Load(-) -> Load(+) -> +12V | 1N4007 flyback diode across load
Same MOSFET circuit as relay node.
Shares 12V PSU with relay node fans.
Standalone — USB-C power only. No GPIO wiring.
Auto-captures every 15min, POSTs to Pi via WiFi.
5V USB: Pi, Climate ESP32, Lighting ESP32, Camera | 12V PSU: Fans + LED strips (via MOSFET)
Tasmota plugs: AC mains (self-powered). All nodes connect to Pi via WiFi/MQTT.
